title: Sunday
content:
Lie still and rest, in that serene repose
    That on this holy morning comes to those
    Who have been burdened with the cares which make
    The sad heart weary and the tired head ache.
        Lie still and rest - 
         God's day of all is best.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ella Wheeler Wilcox delivers a powerful performance in "Sunday"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
